**EOD Vault Sync Complete — 2026-07-05**

✅ **Daily log written:** `studex-obsidian-vault/daily/2026-07-05.md` (208 lines, 9.9KB)

**What's in tonight's vault:**

📦 **Orders:** 0 orders, R0 revenue — Shopify token still blocked
💰 **Revenue:** MTD R0 — no transactions
📱 **Content:** No posts — Meta token expired, Blotato has 0 accounts connected
🔧 **Build:** War Room ContentHub tab shipped — https://krx2vgg4duwc.space.minimax.io
📊 **Research:** China coffee window (Jul 20) confirmed real opportunity, but `studex-wildlife-coffee` repo is an empty shell. China play needs a supplier partner — flagging for Tumelo this week.
🗂️ **6 agent plans** consolidated to vault inbox this week (Fleet Master Plan, Coffee Plan, Home OS, Jarvis Cluster, OS Redesign, RocketChat Deploy)
📅 **Top priorities for Mon Jul 6:**
1. Tumelo: connect FB/IG to Blotato dashboard (unblocks Naledi immediately)
2. Deploy n8n on Orgo VM (Docker one-liner)
3. Shopify Admin API token (unblocks Charlie)
4. China coffee outreach — 15 days until Jul 20 window

⚠️ **GitHub push failed** — same PAT issue. Commit `6d762e8` is local, 2 files changed. Push will retry next sync.
